aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a decent foundation for AEO readiness with some structured data and localized content but lacks comprehensive optimization and review signals.
quick_wins: Generate and manage Google reviews to build trust and improve local search visibility.
Enhance NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) consistency across all online platforms.
Expand schema markup to include more specific service and location details.

gbp_analysis.found: Google Business Profile (GBP) not explicitly mentioned or linked on the website.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP or its active management is a significant gap. GBP is crucial for local SEO and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No evidence of an active GBP linked or mentioned on the website.
Missing opportunities to leverage GBP for local search and customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: The NAP information is present on the website but lacks consistency and broader citation across directories and platforms.
action_items: Audit and ensure NAP consistency across the website, social media, and local directories.
Claim and update profiles on major citation platforms like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business directories.
Regularly monitor and manage NAP citations to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service information
Review schema for aggregating reviews and ratings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive local SEO strategy and GBP optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local plumbing services in Tempe, Arizona.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing structured data for services and location, and actively managing GBP.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building local backlinks and partnerships with local businesses to enhance authority and visibility.

business_name: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air of Tempe
page_title: Top Rated Plumber in Tempe, AZ | Rooter Hero
